body: Quick reply — will follow up properly tomorrow.\n\n— John
subject: Re: Weekly status doc

body: Patrick — can you send me your spring semester schedule so I can plan around it? Thanks bud.\n\n— Dad
subject: Spring schedule

body: Maeve, don't forget your dentist appointment is Thursday at 3. I'll pick you up after practice.\n\n— Dad
subject: Dentist Thursday

body: Declan — are you still good to grab the boat trailer this weekend? Let me know.\n\n— John
subject: Re: Boat trailer

body: Dad, I'll swing by Sunday after my shift to check on the furnace. Don't mess with it yourself.\n\n— John
subject: Furnace

body: Kevin — count me in for the alumni game. What time's warmups?\n\n— John
subject: Re: Alumni game

body: Danny — swapping the Friday 24 with you if the chief signs off. I'll fill out the form.\n\n— Walker
subject: Shift swap Friday

body: Maria — pump test results from Engine 4 attached once I dig them up. Will send EOD.\n\n— Capt. Walker
subject: Re: Engine 4 pump test

body: Dr. Walsh — confirming the clinical rotation slots for my EMT-Basic students next month. Will follow up with the roster.\n\n— John Walker
subject: EMT clinical rotations

body: Colleen — can you grab milk and bread on the way home? Maeve used the last of it.\n\n— J
subject: Groceries

body: Sully — bringing the truck by Saturday for that brake noise. Around 10 work for you?\n\n— John
subject: Re: Brake noise

body: Tom — the new probie roster looks good. Let's go over assignments before Monday's shift.\n\n— Walker
subject: Probie assignments

body: Tommy — alumni committee meeting moved to the 28th. Same spot. Pass it along.\n\n— John
subject: Re: Committee meeting

body: Aunt Peggy — yes, we'll be there Christmas Eve. Bringing the kids and a dessert.\n\n— John
subject: Re: Christmas Eve

body: Linda — sending over the updated training records spreadsheet for the recert deadline. Almost done.\n\n— Capt. Walker
subject: Re: Recert deadline

body:
Copy on the SOP packet — will hit 5.1–5.7 tonight and log the Blue Card scenarios by Thursday.

— J.W.
subject: Re: Battalion Chief exam study window — SOP packet

body:
Handling proteins. Grabbing ribeyes at Roche Bros after shift Saturday. Sound good?

— John
subject: Re: Sunday cookout — headcount and shopping

body:
Awards under 20 min, promise. Bringing the Elks a bottle of Bushmills for the room manager.

— John
subject: Re: Banquet menu locked — final count 42

body:
In. Bringing Sam Adams. Tell Tommy the beer tab is his again.

— J.
subject: Re: Big game 10/31 confirmed — $100 buy-in

body: Quick reply — will follow up properly tomorrow.\n\n— John
subject: Re: Weekly status doc
